creator: ventu@netfence.it
text:
Currently this port is deprecated and should have been removed already.

1.5.8 has been out for more than a year, though,  and is needed for 
out-of-the-box compatibility with Postgres 9.2.
I wasn't able to find out whether this version is EOLed upstream too.

In any case, I'm attaching a revised patch, which builds (at least on 
9.1/i386 and 9.2/amd64).
